messages.content: What time does the bakery close today?
The bakery closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Can you help me find my keys?
I'd check near the front door or your bedroom nightstand — that's where people usually set them down.
Hi, I'm looking for the train station.
The train station is two blocks north on Main Street, past the pharmacy.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it's been raining since this morning.
How do I reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, then check your email for the reset link.
My son has soccer practice on Tuesday — should I bring water?
Yes, definitely bring water. Practice runs for an hour and the coach doesn't provide it.
Count the blue chairs in your view.
I don't have the ability to see physical spaces, so I can't count chairs for you.
Which is cheaper — the red notebook or the black one?
The black notebook is $2.50 cheaper; it's $4.99 versus $7.49.
Do you know where Margaret lives?
I don't have access to personal information like that.
Tell me how to boil an egg.
Put eggs in cold water, bring to a boil, then remove from heat and let sit for 10 minutes before peeling.
Does the museum have free admission on Sundays?
Yes, Sundays are free for all visitors until 5 PM.
What's the fastest route to the airport from here?
Take Highway 12 East for about 20 minutes — it's usually the quickest way to avoid traffic.
Is your dog friendly with other pets?
I'm an AI assistant, so I don't have a dog, but I can help you find pet-friendly advice if you need it.
Remind me — what color is your car?
I'm an AI, so I don't have a car, but I'm happy to help you remember your own car's details if you tell me about it.
How many pages is that book?
It's 342 pages long, and it's a quick read — probably takes about 5–6 hours.
Should I wear a jacket tomorrow?
Yes, the forecast shows temperatures dropping to 52°F, so a light jacket would be smart.
Where can I buy stamps?
You can buy stamps at the post office, or online through USPS if you prefer.
Did you see the game last night?
I don't watch sports, but I can discuss the score and highlights if you'd like to tell me about it.
When does your shift end?
I'm an AI, so I don't work shifts, but I'm available to help you anytime you need me.
What ingredients do I need for rice and beans?
Rice, beans, water, oil, salt, and garlic. Some people add onions or peppers for extra flavor.
Can you help me find my keys?
Did you check the kitchen counter? That's where I usually find mine.
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Please tell me how to reset my password.
Go to the login page and click 'Forgot password?' — you'll receive a reset link by email.
Which train arrives at platform 3 next?
The 2:15 to Manchester arrives at platform 3 in about eight minutes.
Do you prefer coffee or tea?
I prefer tea, especially in the afternoon.
How many people are coming to the dinner party?
Six people confirmed so far, including you and me.
Turn off the lights when you leave, okay?
Sure, I'll make sure to switch them off on my way out.
What's the capital of Australia?
It's Canberra.
Does this shirt match my pants?
Yes, the blue tones work really well together.
When did you last water the plants?
I watered them yesterday afternoon, so they should be fine for a couple more days.
Is there milk in the fridge?
Yes, there's a half-full carton on the second shelf.
How do I get to the library from here?
Walk down this street for three blocks, then turn left at the corner store.
Are you free this Thursday evening?
No, I have a meeting scheduled until 7 PM, but I'm free after that.
Count the number of windows in this room.
There are four windows — three along that wall and one on the north side.
Did you remember to buy groceries?
I did — milk, bread, and vegetables. They're in the kitchen.
What color is a lemon?
Lemons are typically yellow, though some can be pale green.
Remind me to call David tomorrow morning.
I'll send you a reminder at 9 AM tomorrow to call David.
Is the movie worth watching?
Most people enjoy it if you like adventure films, though it's a bit long.
What time does the library close today?
The library closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting tomorrow?
I'm not sure — you'd need to check with Marcus directly or see if he's on the invite list.
Hi, how are you doing today?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Pass me the salt, please.
Here you go — it's right in front of you now.
Is Seattle rainier than Portland?
Yes, Seattle gets more annual rainfall than Portland does.
How do I reset my phone password?
Go to Settings, then Security, and select Change Password. You'll need your current password to start.
How many eggs are in that carton?
There are twelve eggs in the carton.
Did Elena say anything about the move?
Not that I'm aware of — she hasn't mentioned it to me.
Which shelf should I put the glasses on?
The top shelf is fine — they'll fit easily up there.
Good morning! Ready for Friday?
Good morning! I am — looking forward to the weekend.
Is your coffee still warm?
It's lukewarm now, I've been sitting here for a while.
What's the fastest route to the airport from here?
The highway north is usually quickest — about twenty-five minutes depending on traffic.
Turn down the volume a bit, will you?
Done — it should be more comfortable now.
Is your apartment bigger than ours?
No, actually yours has more square footage than mine.
How do you make a grilled cheese sandwich?
Butter two slices of bread, put cheese between them, and cook in a pan on medium heat until golden on both sides.
Did the package arrive yet?
Yes, it came this morning and I left it by the front door.
Remind me — which day is the dentist appointment?
Your appointment is next Wednesday at 2 PM.
Is the new café open yet?
I think it opens next week, but I'm not completely certain.
Can you list the steps for checking in at the hotel?
Go to the front desk with your ID and confirmation number, fill out the guest form, get your room key, and they'll show you where the elevators are.
Have you tried the new pasta place downtown?
Not yet, but I've heard good things about it from a few friends.
Hi, do you have any recommendations for a good coffee shop nearby?
There's a nice place called The Daily Grind about two blocks from here. They have great espresso and a quiet corner for reading.
Can you tell me how to reset my printer?
Press and hold the power button for 10 seconds until all the lights blink, then release it and wait for it to restart.
Is it supposed to rain this weekend?
Yes, rain is expected Saturday afternoon and evening.
How many people are coming to Marcus's birthday party?
About 15 people confirmed so far, maybe a couple more haven't answered yet.
Where did you put my keys?
They're on the kitchen counter next to the fruit bowl, where you left them this morning.
Do you prefer tea or coffee?
I usually go with coffee in the morning, but I like herbal tea in the afternoon.
Show me how to tie a proper knot.
Cross the right end over the left, pull it through the loop, then tighten by pulling both ends away from each other.
Has Elena called yet about the apartment viewing?
Not yet, but she texted earlier to say she'd call before noon tomorrow.
What's the capital of Australia?
Canberra is the capital of Australia.
Do we need to buy milk at the store?
Yes, we're almost out. Can you grab a liter while you're there?
How long has David been working at the accounting firm?
He's been there for about three years now.
Is this shirt the right size for you?
It looks a bit loose in the shoulders. I think I need a size down.
Tell me the steps to change a bike tire.
Remove the wheel, take out the old tire with a lever, insert the new tire starting at the valve, and pump it up to the recommended pressure.
Did the package arrive from the supplier?
Yes, it came in this morning. I left it in the storage room.
Which route is faster to the train station — through downtown or along the river?
The river route is faster, especially during rush hour when downtown gets congested.
How many layers does a lasagna usually have?
Typically four or five layers of pasta, sauce, and cheese, depending on how deep your baking dish is.
Can you remind me what year the Titanic sank?
The Titanic sank in 1912.
Should I water the plants today?
The soil is still moist, so wait until tomorrow. Check it again in the morning.
What's the difference between the blue notebook and the red one?
The blue one has lined pages and the red one is blank. They're also different sizes — blue is A4 and red is pocket-sized.
What time does the bakery close today?
They close at 6 PM on weekdays.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting?
He sent a message saying he'll be there at 2 o'clock.
Hey, how's it going?
Pretty good, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll make sure to switch them off before I go.
Is the new laptop faster than the old one?
Yes, it has a much better processor and more memory.
How do I reset the password on this account?
Click on 'Forgot Password' at the login screen, then follow the steps in your email.
How many plates do we need for dinner tonight?
We have six people coming, so we'll need six plates plus a couple extras.
Did you watch the game last night?
No, I had to work late, but I heard it was a good one.
What's the address of the clinic on Main Street?
It's at 42 Main Street, right next to the pharmacy.
Good morning, how are you doing today?
Good morning! I'm doing well, thank you. Hope your day is going nicely too.
Please remind me to pick up the dry cleaning tomorrow.
Done — I've set a reminder for you tomorrow at 5 PM.
Is this coffee still hot?
It's warm but not hot anymore — you might want to microwave it.
What's the difference between these two hiking trails?
The north trail is shorter but steeper, while the south trail is longer and flatter.
Can you show me how to tie this knot?
Loop the rope over like this, then pull the end through and tighten it.
Did Jen say when she's arriving?
She texted that she'll be here around 7 in the evening.
What colour is your front door?
It's dark green with a brass knocker.
Count how many books are on that shelf, would you?
There are 14 books stacked there.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Yes, the weather forecast says there's a chance of rain in the afternoon.
Who's organizing the team lunch next week?
David volunteered to coordinate it — he's sending out options on Friday.
Can dogs eat avocados?
No, avocados are toxic to dogs, so it's best to keep them away.
Can you tell me how to reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, then check your email for a reset link.
Is it raining outside right now?
I can't see outside, but you can check a weather app or look out your window.
Hi, how are you doing today?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How can I help you?
Which is better—coffee or tea?
That depends on what you prefer. Some people like the strength of coffee, others enjoy the calm of tea.
How do I boil an egg?
Put eggs in a pot of cold water, bring it to a boil, then let them sit for about 10 minutes before cooling in ice water.
What day comes after Thursday?
Friday comes after Thursday.
Do you have any recommendations for a good book?
It depends on what genre you like. Do you prefer mystery, fantasy, romance, or something else?
Where's the nearest grocery store from here?
I don't know your location, but you can search for grocery stores on a maps app to find the closest one.
Please turn off the lights when you leave.
I'll turn off the lights before I go.
Is your car blue or black?
My car is silver.
How many students are in your class?
There are 24 students in my class.
Good morning! Did you sleep well?
Good morning! Yes, I slept pretty well, thanks. How about you?
What's the capital of France?
Paris is the capital of France.
Can dogs eat chocolate?
No, chocolate is toxic to dogs and should never be given to them.
Show me how to tie a shoelace.
Cross one lace over the other, pull tight, make two loops, then cross one loop over the other and pull through the hole.
How old is your dog?
She's five years old now.
What comes next in this sequence: 2, 4, 6, 8?
The next number is 10.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Check the forecast for tomorrow's weather to decide.
Which restaurant did you go to last night?
We went to that Italian place on Main Street that just opened.
What time does the bakery open tomorrow?
The bakery opens at 7 in the morning.
Can you help me find my keys?
Did you check the kitchen counter? That's where you usually leave them.
Is the bus stop near the library?
Yes, it's about a five-minute walk from there.
Please remind me to call the dentist before noon.
I'll remind you to call the dentist before noon.
Which is faster, the train or the car?
During rush hour, the train is usually faster. Off-peak, they're about the same.
How do I reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the steps in your email.
What's the capital of Portugal?
Lisbon is the capital of Portugal.
Did Marcus finish his homework?
No, he's still working on the math assignment.
Good morning. Is it going to rain today?
Good morning. Yes, there's a 70% chance of rain in the afternoon.
How many eggs do we need for the recipe?
The recipe calls for three eggs.
Turn off the lights when you leave the office.
I'll turn off the lights before I go.
Do you prefer tea or coffee?
I'd say coffee in the morning, tea in the evening.
What's in the grocery bag on the table?
There's milk, bread, and some vegetables in there.
Can I borrow your umbrella?
Sure, it's by the door. Just bring it back when the rain stops.
Which floor is the accounting department on?
Accounting is on the third floor.
Is your cat friendly?
Yes, she's very friendly and loves being petted.
Tell me the steps to make a simple sandwich.
Slice the bread, add cheese and ham, then close it. That's it.
How old is your brother?
He's 28 years old.
Should we reschedule the meeting?
Yes, let's move it to Thursday afternoon instead.
What time does the coffee shop close today?
It closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Can you tell me how to reset my phone password?
Go to Settings, then Security, and select Change Password. You'll need your current password first.
Hi there, how's your day going?
It's going well, thanks for asking! How about yours?
Is the train station within walking distance from here?
Yes, it's about a fifteen-minute walk heading east.
Which is easier to learn, piano or guitar?
Guitar is usually considered easier to start with because you can play simple songs faster, though both take time to master.
Pass me the salt, would you?
Sure, here you go.
How many pages is the assignment supposed to be?
It should be between 5 and 7 pages, double-spaced.
Do you know where Marcus usually sits during lunch?
He usually sits by the window near the south entrance.
What's the order of the solar system planets starting from the sun?
Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Yes, rain is expected in the afternoon and evening.
My car won't start this morning. Any suggestions?
Check if your battery terminals are clean and tight, and make sure the key turns smoothly in the ignition.
Hello! I'm here for the 2 PM appointment with Dr. Chen.
Welcome! Please check in at the front desk, and they'll get you registered.
Does your gym offer swimming classes?
Yes, we have beginner and intermediate swimming classes on Tuesday and Thursday evenings.
Is milk or almond milk better for smoothies?
Both work well; milk gives a creamier texture, while almond milk is lighter and suits dairy-free diets.
How do I attach a file to an email?
Click the paperclip icon in the compose window and select the file from your computer.
Did you remember to call the plumber about the leak?
Yes, I called this morning and they can come by Friday afternoon.
What's the quickest route to downtown from here?
Take Main Street north for about two miles, then turn right on Fifth Avenue.
Is Sophia allergic to peanuts?
She has a mild allergy, so it's better to avoid foods with peanuts when she visits.
How should I care for a new potted plant?
Water it when the soil feels dry to the touch, place it in bright indirect light, and turn it every few days for even growth.
Is the library open on Sundays?
Yes, the library opens at 1 PM and closes at 5 PM on Sundays.
Hey, how's it going?
Good, thanks for asking. How are you doing?
Can you pass me the salt?
Sure, here you go.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it's been drizzling for about an hour.
How do I start a compost bin?
You'll need a bin, some soil, and a mix of green and brown materials like food scraps and leaves.
Which is faster, the train or the bus?
The train is usually faster for longer distances.
Do you know Marcus?
I'm not sure which Marcus you mean — is he a coworker of yours?
Count the chairs in the living room for me.
There are four chairs total — two by the window and two near the bookshelf.
What's your favorite color?
I don't have preferences, but I'd be happy to help you pick one for your project.
Did Sarah call you back yet?
No, not yet. I'm expecting to hear from her by tomorrow afternoon.
Turn off the lights before you leave.
Will do — I'll make sure they're all off.
Where's the nearest grocery store?
There's one about two blocks east on Main Street.
Is this jacket too big?
It's a bit roomy in the shoulders, but the length looks right on you.
How many steps until we reach the park?
From here, it's roughly a ten-minute walk, so probably around 1,500 steps.
Did you enjoy the movie last night?
I didn't see it, but I heard it was really good from a few friends.
Tell me the steps to brew tea.
Boil water, steep the tea bag for three to five minutes, then pour into your cup.
Is your dog friendly with other dogs?
Yes, she gets along well with most dogs at the park.
What's in that envelope on the desk?
I think it's the electric bill — it came in yesterday's mail.
Morning! Did you sleep well?
Morning! Yeah, I slept okay, thanks. You?
Which route should I take to avoid traffic?
Try the highway — it should be clearer this time of day.
Can you pass me the salt?
Of course, here you go.
Is it supposed to rain tomorrow?
Yes, there's a chance of rain in the afternoon.
How many steps are there from the train station to City Hall?
It's roughly a fifteen-minute walk, so probably around 1,200 steps depending on your stride.
Which is faster — biking or driving to work?
Driving is usually faster because you avoid traffic lights and pedestrian crossings on the bike route.
Do you know where I left my glasses?
I haven't seen them, but they're often on the kitchen counter or beside the bathroom sink.
Tell me the steps to make a simple omelette.
Heat butter in a pan, beat two eggs with salt and pepper, pour them in, and fold when the edges set. It takes about three minutes.
Does your daughter enjoy piano lessons?
She does — she's been taking them for eight months and practices almost every day now.
How do I reset my phone password?
Go to Settings, find Security, and select Change Password. You'll need your current password first.
Did Marcus call about the meeting?
Not yet — he said he'd call by noon, so you might hear from him soon.
How many people are coming to the party on Saturday?
Last count was twelve, but a few are still confirming whether they can make it.
Should I wear a jacket outside?
Yes, it's around 55 degrees and a bit windy, so a jacket would be comfortable.
What color is the new office sofa?
It's a dark gray with neutral-toned cushions.
Can you recommend a good coffee shop nearby?
Yes — there's one called The Brew House two blocks west that has excellent espresso and pastries.
How long will the plumber take to fix the sink?
He said about an hour, maybe a bit more if there's corrosion in the pipes.
Does the library have the book I requested?
I checked online — it's in stock, so you can pick it up anytime after 10 AM tomorrow.
What happened at the game last night?
Our team won 4–2 in overtime — it was an exciting match.
Please remind me to buy groceries.
Noted — don't forget to pick up groceries before the store closes.
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking! How about you?
Is tomorrow supposed to rain?
Yes, rain is expected in the morning and afternoon.
Which is faster, the train or the bus?
The train is usually faster for long distances.
How do I reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the email instructions.
Count the chairs in this room, please.
There are four chairs around the table.
Good morning!
Good morning! Hope you have a great day.
Did Marcus call yesterday?
No, I didn't see any missed calls from him.
What's your favorite fruit?
I'd say apples are pretty good—crisp and sweet.
Turn off the lights when you leave.
Will do—I'll make sure they're off.
Does this jacket fit you well?
Yes, it's comfortable and the length is just right.
How many chapters are in that book?
The book has 12 chapters total.
Where did you put the keys?
I left them on the kitchen counter next to the microwave.
Should we order pizza or cook dinner?
Pizza sounds easier—we could cook tomorrow instead.
Is the meeting still at 3 PM?
Yes, it starts at 3 PM in Conference Room B.
Show me how to tie this knot.
Cross the left end over the right, then pull it through the loop you made.
What color is your car?
It's silver with a black roof.
Did you finish the report?
Yes, I sent it to your email this morning.
List the items we need for the picnic.
Plates, napkins, drinks, and sandwiches are the main ones.
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How are you?
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll make sure to turn them off before I go.
How do I reset my password on this app?
Tap the 'Forgot Password' link on the login screen and follow the instructions sent to your email.
My coffee maker isn't working. Any ideas?
Check if it's plugged in and that the water reservoir is filled. If it still doesn't turn on, the power button might be stuck.
Which tastes better — the apple pie or the chocolate cake?
I'd say the chocolate cake is richer, but the apple pie is lighter and more refreshing. It depends on what you're in the mood for.
How many stops until we reach downtown?
There are three more stops before we get to downtown.
Do you know where Marcus parked his car?
I think he said he parked it on Fifth Street near the corner store.
Tell me the recipe for scrambled eggs.
Crack eggs into a bowl, beat them, pour into a hot buttered pan, and stir constantly until soft curds form. Season with salt and pepper.
What did Elena say about the project deadline?
She mentioned it's been pushed back to next Friday instead of this Wednesday.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Yes, the forecast shows a 70% chance of rain in the afternoon.
Sort these books by size, smallest to largest.
Done — I've arranged them in order from smallest to largest on the shelf.
When does your flight leave on Friday?
My flight departs at 2:15 PM from Terminal C.
Is the grocery store still open, or did it close early?
It's still open until 10 PM, so you have plenty of time.
How old is your daughter now?
She just turned seven last month.
Play that song again from the beginning.
I'll restart it for you now.
Which bus route goes to the hospital?
The number 12 bus stops right at the main entrance of the hospital.
Does your brother know how to fix a bicycle?
Yes, he's pretty handy with repairs — he fixed mine last year.
Count the chairs in this room for me.
There are six chairs — four around the table and two by the window.
What time does the museum close today?
It closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Hi, I'm looking for the pasta aisle.
It's in the back left corner, next to the rice and grains.
Do you know if it's raining outside right now?
Yes, it started about an hour ago.
Can you help me move this desk to the other side of the room?
Sure, I'll grab this end and we'll lift it together on three.
Which is cheaper, the blue notebook or the red one?
The blue one is $2 cheaper at $5.99 versus $7.99.
How do I reset my phone password?
Go to Settings, then Security, and tap Reset Password to create a new one.
Is the train station within walking distance from here?
Yes, it's about a 15-minute walk heading north on Main Street.
How many eggs do I need for this recipe?
The recipe calls for three large eggs.
Did Marcus finish his shift early yesterday?
No, he worked until the usual closing time at 9 PM.
Tell me where the nearest pharmacy is.
There's one two blocks east in the shopping center next to the grocery store.
Does your dog like to swim in the lake?
Yes, she loves it and jumps in whenever we visit.
What's the difference between a latte and a cappuccino?
A latte has more steamed milk, while a cappuccino has more espresso and less milk.
Can I bring my laptop to the meeting tomorrow?
Yes, everyone's bringing theirs since we'll be reviewing the project files together.
How do I get to the airport from downtown?
Take the express bus on Fifth Avenue — it gets there in about 30 minutes.
Did Sarah say whether she's coming to dinner on Friday?
She texted this morning that she'll be there around 7 o'clock.
What's your favorite type of cuisine?
I enjoy Thai food — especially pad thai and coconut curries.
Is the library open on Sundays?
Yes, it's open from 1 PM to 5 PM on Sundays.
How many chapters are in that book you're reading?
It has 24 chapters total, and I'm currently on chapter 8.
Should I water my plants before or after work?
Either works fine, but morning watering is slightly better since they'll absorb it throughout the day.
Is Kevin still working at the old office location?
No, he transferred to the new downtown building last month.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting?
He said he'd be there by 2 o'clock.
Hello! How are you doing today?
Hi! I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you turn off the living room light?
Done — the light is off now.
Is the blue notebook yours or Helen's?
It's Helen's. Mine is the green one on the shelf.
How do I reset the printer?
Press and hold the button on the back for about 10 seconds.
How many people signed up for the yoga class?
Twelve people have registered so far.
Does Daniel prefer coffee or tea?
He's always been a coffee person.
Good morning. Did you sleep well?
Good morning! Yes, I did, thanks. Hope you did too.
Put the groceries on the counter, please.
I'll do that right now.
Which is longer — the river or the lake route?
The river walk is about two miles longer.
Is your car in the driveway?
No, I parked it at the gym earlier.
What's the name of that restaurant on Fifth Street?
I think it's called Olive & Sage.
Hand me the remote, would you?
Here you go.
Does the recipe call for white or brown sugar?
Brown sugar — it says so in step two.
Hey, how's the new job going?
It's going pretty well so far. The team is friendly and the work keeps me busy.
Remind me to call the dentist tomorrow.
I'll remind you first thing in the morning.
How many seasons does that show have?
It has five seasons total.
Are the keys on the kitchen table?
Yes, they're by the fruit bowl.
What's the fastest way to the airport from here?
The highway is usually your quickest option — about 20 minutes if traffic is light.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting?
I'm not sure — you'd have to check with him directly.
Hey, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll turn them off before I go.
Is coffee cheaper than tea at this cafe?
Tea is actually cheaper — coffee is about two dollars more.
How do I set up the printer?
Plug it in, install the drivers from the CD, and it should appear in your settings.
How many people signed up for the workshop?
Twelve people have registered so far.
Did you finish reading that book I lent you?
Not yet — I'm about halfway through it. I'm really enjoying it though.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
It looks like rain is expected, so yes, bringing one would be a good idea.
Show me how to tie a basic knot.
Cross the right end over the left, pull it through the loop, then tighten.
How many slices are in that pizza?
There are eight slices in that pizza.
Is your car parked nearby?
Yes, it's in the lot about a block away.
What should I cook for dinner tonight?
Pasta with vegetables would be quick and easy.
Can you remember to call Sarah this afternoon?
I'll add it to my to-do list and give her a call after lunch.
Which is faster — walking or taking the bus?
The bus is faster; the walk would take about 20 minutes longer.
Morning! Did you sleep well?
Good morning. Yes, I slept quite well, thanks. Hope you did too.
List the steps to make a simple salad.
Wash the lettuce, chop the vegetables, toss them together, and add dressing.
Is the store open on Sundays?
Yes, they're open from 10 AM to 5 PM on Sundays.
Can you pick up milk on your way home?
No problem, I'll grab a carton at the store.
What time does the bakery close today?
They close at 6 PM on Thursdays.
Is it going to rain tomorrow?
The forecast says there's a 70% chance of rain in the afternoon.
Pass me the salt, please.
Here you go — it's right there on the table.
Which is faster, the bus or the train?
The train is usually faster during rush hour, but the bus costs less.
How do I turn on the dishwasher?
Press the power button on the front and select your cycle.
Did Marcus call you back yet?
No, I haven't heard from him since yesterday morning.
Count the apples in the basket for me.
There are seven apples in the basket.
What's your favorite pizza topping?
I'd say pepperoni is a good choice, but mushrooms are nice too.
The meeting is at 3 PM, right?
